mainEntity.name: Timeline from ladder fall to settlement in Sandy UT?
mainEntity.text: Timeline from ladder fall to settlement in Sandy UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: 6-18 months typical: 3 mo TTD, 6 mo MMI, 3 mo negotiate. Appeals add 12 mo.

suggestedAnswer.text: Sandy fast-tracks simple sprains; fractures extend to 24 mo. Monitor via status conferences. Early attorney involvement cuts 30% time per stats.
